description_long: This guard rail features a rectangular, solid panel with a grid-like pattern on one side, likely designed for added structural rigidity. The main rail is supported by two robust, blocky bases at either end, which provide stability and anchoring to the ground. The panel itself is smooth and unadorned on the reverse side, while the front displays a series of recessed rectangular sections. The color is a uniform light gray, suggesting a metal or heavy-duty composite material, suitable for urban environments such as roadsides or parking lots. The overall construction appears industrial and functional, with no visible reflective markings or decorative elements. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared, with no flaring or tapering.
description: A light gray, rectangular guard rail with a grid-patterned front and solid, blocky bases at each end, designed for urban roadside or parking lot use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grid-patterned panel and both supporting bases.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the panel and the depth of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smooth, unpatterned surface and both bases.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and base depth.
